creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
sem         2007-02-07 08:40:44 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net/samba3           Makefile distinfo 
    net/samba3/files     samba.in 
  Log:
  - Update to 3.0.24
     This release contains fixes for the following security advisories:
     o CVE-2007-0452 (Potential Denial of Service bug in smbd)
     o CVE-2007-0453 (Buffer overrun in NSS host lookup Winbind
       NSS library on Solaris)
     o CVE-2007-0454 (Format string bug in afsacl.so VFS plugin)
  
  - Improve RC-file.
  
  PR:             ports/108803
  Submitted by:   maintainer
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.157     +58 -58    ports/net/samba3/Makefile
  1.74      +3 -3      ports/net/samba3/distinfo
  1.5       +35 -29    ports/net/samba3/files/samba.in
